enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Some of the Urban Cooperative Banks (UCBs) may also be involved in implementation
of various forms of Debt Relief Schemes (DRS) announced by State Governments that
inter alia entail sacrifice / waiver of debt obligations of a targeted segment of borrowers,
against fiscal support.
enriched_requirements.object: implementation of various forms of Debt Relief Schemes (DRS) announced by State Governments that inter alia entail sacrifice / wai

conditions: If such schemes are announced frequently
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If such schemes are announced frequently, incommensurately, or
without due consideration to the principles of financial discipline, they would negatively
affect credit discipline and in the long run, may be counter-productive to the credit flow to
such borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: credit flow to such borrowers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect unless specified
otherwise.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect unless specified otherwise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall apply to Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as a 'UCB').
enriched_requirements.object: Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as a 'UCB')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, urban co-operative banks shall mean Primary Co-operative Banks
as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act,
1949.
enriched_requirements.object: as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act, 1949

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A UCB shall follow the requirements of the State Co-operative Societies Acts and /
or rules made thereunder, or other statutory enactments, if they are more stringent
than those prescribed hereby.
enriched_requirements.object: the State Co-operative Societies Acts and / or rules made thereunder, or other statutory enactments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, the following definitions shall apply, unless the context otherwise
requires:
(1) 'advances' shall mean all kinds of credit facilities including cash credit,
overdrafts, term loans, bills discounted / purchased, receivables, etc.

(2) 'aggregate exposure' shall include all fund based and non-fund based
exposure, including investment exposure;
enriched_requirements.object: and non-fund based exposure, including investment exposure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'compromise settlement' shall refer to any negotiated arrangement with the
borrower to fully settle the claims of a bank against the borrower in cash.
enriched_requirements.object: arrangement with the borrower to fully settle the claims of a bank against the borrower in cash

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

amount due from the borrower on the part of the bank with corresponding
waiver of claims of the bank against the borrower to that extent.

(15) 'satisfactory performance' shall mean adherence to the following conditions

enriched_requirements.object: following conditions during that period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall put in place a Board-approved policy for restructuring / rehabilitation of
stressed assets.
enriched_requirements.object: Board-approved policy for restructuring / rehabilitation of stressed assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall put in place Board-approved policies for undertaking compromise
settlements with the borrowers as well as for technical write-offs, which shall inter
alia include the following:
(1) comprehensive prescription of the process to be followed for all compromise
settlements and technical write-offs, with specific guidance on the
necessary conditions precedent such as minimum ageing, deterioration in
collateral value etc.;
enriched_requirements.object: policies for undertaking compromise settlements with the borrowers as well as for technical write-offs, which shall inter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) graded framework for examination of staff accountability in such cases with
reasonable thresholds and timelines as may be decided by the Board;
enriched_requirements.object: Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) delegation of power for such approvals rests with an authority
(individual or committee, as the case may be) which is at least one
level higher in hierarchy than the authority vested with power to
sanction the credit / investment exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: least one level higher in hierarchy than the authority vested with power to sanction the credit / investment exposure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that any official who was part of sanctioning the loan (as
individual or part of a committee) shall not be part of the approving the
proposal for compromise settlement of the same loan account, in any
capacity.
enriched_requirements.object: approving the proposal for compromise settlement of the same loan account, in any capacity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) proposals for compromise settlements in respect of borrowers
classified as fraud or wilful defaulter, as permitted in terms of
paragraphs 51 to 65, shall require approval of the Board in all cases.
enriched_requirements.object: Board in all cases

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The board approved policy of the bank shall incorporate provisions for resolution
as provided for under Chapter IV-A of these Directions, including the following:
(1) the objective principles for the terms of relief to be granted to various borrower
/ loan categories.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank having total assets of ₹500 crore and above shall report credit information,
including classification of an account as SMA, to Central Repository of Information
on Large Credits (CRILC), on all borrowers having aggregate exposure of ₹5 crore
and above with them, on a quarterly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: classification of an account as SMA, to Central Repository of Information on Large Credits (CRILC), on all borrow

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall adhere to the relevant provisions on submission of financial information
to information utilities of Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 and Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Board of India (Information Utilities) Regulations, 2017 and put in place
appropriate systems and procedures to ensure compliance to the provisions of the
Code and Regulations.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions on submission of financial information to information utilities of Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 and Insolven

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make suitable disclosures in its financial statements in the 'Notes to
Accounts', as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks -
Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: its financial statements in the 'Notes to Accounts', as specified in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure careful assessment of the viability, quick detection of
weaknesses in accounts and a time-bound implementation of restructuring
packages to achieve the basic objective of preservation of economic value of units
through restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: the viability, quick detection of weaknesses in accounts and a time-bound implementation of restructuring packages to ach

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may restructure the accounts classified under 'standard', 'sub-standard' and
'doubtful' categories.
enriched_requirements.object: under 'standard', 'sub-standard' and 'doubtful' categories

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not reschedule / restructure / renegotiate borrower accounts with
retrospective effect.
enriched_requirements.object: renegotiate borrower accounts with retrospective effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding paragraph 18 above, the process of restructuring may be initiated
by a bank in deserving cases subject to customer agreeing to the terms and
conditions.
enriched_requirements.object: bank in deserving cases subject to customer agreeing to the terms and conditions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Restructuring of advances may take place in the following stages:
(1) before commencement of commercial production / operation;
enriched_requirements.object: following stages: (1) before commencement of commercial production / operation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not take up an account for restructuring unless the financial viability is
established and there is a reasonable certainty of repayment from the borrower, as
per the terms of restructuring package.
enriched_requirements.object: for restructuring unless the financial viability is established and there is a reasonable certainty of repayment from the borrower,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of paragraph 21 above, the viability shall be determined by a UCB
based on the acceptable viability benchmarks determined by them, which may be
applied on a case-by-case basis, depending on merits of each case.
enriched_requirements.object: UCB based on the acceptable viability benchmarks determined by them, which may be applied on a case-by-case basis, depending on mer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Illustratively, the viability parameters may include the Return on Capital
Employed, Debt Service Coverage Ratio, Gap between the Internal Rate of Return
and Cost of Funds and the amount of provision required in lieu of the diminution in
the fair value of the restructured advance.
enriched_requirements.object: Capital Employed, Debt Service Coverage Ratio, Gap between the Internal Rate of Return and Cost of Funds and the amount of provi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The usual asset classification norms would continue to apply while a restructuring
proposal is under consideration and the process of re-classification of an asset shall
not stop merely because restructuring proposal is under consideration.
enriched_requirements.object: proposal is under consideration

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The accounts not considered viable shall not be restructured and the bank shall
accelerate the recovery measures in respect of such accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: bank shall accelerate the recovery measures in respect of such accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any restructuring done without looking into cash flows of the borrower and
assessing the viability of the projects / activity financed by a bank shall be treated
as an attempt at ever greening a weak credit facility and shall invite supervisory
concerns / action.
enriched_requirements.object: attempt at ever greening a weak credit facility and shall invite supervisory concerns / action

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The accounts classified as 'standard assets' shall be immediately re-classified as
'sub-standard assets' upon restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: 'sub-standard assets' upon restructuring

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An account classified as a non-performing asset, upon restructuring, shall slip into
further lower asset classification category as per extant asset classification norms
with reference to the pre-restructuring repayment schedule.
enriched_requirements.object: asset classification category as per extant asset classification norms with reference to the pre-restructuring repayment sched

conditions: If a restructured asset
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a restructured asset, which is a standard asset on restructuring is subjected to
restructuring on a subsequent occasion, it shall be classified as substandard.

However, such advances restructured on second or more occasion shall be allowed
to be upgraded to standard category after the specified period in terms of the current
restructuring package, subject to satisfactory performance.
enriched_requirements.object: upgraded to standard category after the specified period in terms of the current restructuring package

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall classify Funded Interest Term Loan' (FITL) created by conversion of
unpaid interest in the same asset classification category in which the restructured
advance has been classified.
enriched_requirements.object: Loan' (FITL) created by conversion of unpaid interest in the same asset classification category in which the restructure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall be eligible for special regulatory treatment in respect of borrowers
engaged in important business activities, subject to compliance with certain
conditions as enumerated in paragraphs 37 and 38.
enriched_requirements.object: regulatory treatment in respect of borrowers engaged in important business activities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that such special regulatory treatment shall not be extended to the
following categories of advances:
(1) Consumer and personal advances including advances to individuals against
the securities of shares/bonds/debentures etc.
enriched_requirements.object: following categories of advances: (1) Consumer and personal advances including advances to individuals against the securities of sh

if the approved
package is implemented by the bank within 90 days from the date of receipt of
application by the bank

within 90 days from the date of receipt of
application by the bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As an incentive for quick implementation of restructuring package, if the approved
package is implemented by the bank within 90 days from the date of receipt of
application by the bank, the asset classification status may be restored to the
position which existed when the restructuring application was received by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: position which existed when the restructuring application was received by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An existing standard asset shall not be downgraded to the sub-standard category
upon restructuring and the asset classification of the sub-standard/doubtful
accounts shall not deteriorate upon restructuring, subject to compliance with the
following conditions:
(1) The dues to the bank are 'fully secured'
Provided that the above requirement shall not be applicable in the following
cases:
enriched_requirements.object: sub-standard category upon restructuring and the asset classification of the sub-standard/doubtful accounts shall not deteriorate upon restructuring

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The Board of Directors of the bank shall prescribe the maximum period not
exceeding fifteen years for restructured advances keeping in view the safety
and soundness of advances.
enriched_requirements.object: not exceeding fifteen years for restructured advances keeping in view the safety and soundness of advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Promoters' sacrifice and additional funds brought by them should be a
minimum of 15 per cent of bank's sacrifice.
enriched_requirements.object: 15 per cent of bank's sacrifice

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any additional finance sanctioned by a bank may be treated as 'standard asset', up
to a period of one year after the first interest / principal payment, whichever is earlier,
falls due under the approved restructuring package.
enriched_requirements.object: asset', up to a period of one year after the first interest / principal payment, whichever is earlier, falls due under the app

conditions:
If the restructured asset does not qualify for upgradation at the end of the one-year
period specified in paragraph 39
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the restructured asset does not qualify for upgradation at the end of the one-year
period specified in paragraph 39, a bank shall place the additional finance in the
same asset classification category as the restructured debt.
enriched_requirements.object: in the same asset classification category as the restructured debt

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An account that has been restructured shall attract provisioning as per the asset
classification category as laid out in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions,
2025.
enriched_requirements.object: the asset classification category as laid out in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Income Recognition,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall make provisions for diminution in the fair value of restructured
advances as below:
(1) The erosion in the fair value of the advance shall be computed as the
difference between the fair value of the loan before and after restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: in the fair value of restructured advances as below: (1) The erosion in the fair value of the advance shall be computed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Fair value of the loan before restructuring shall be computed as the present
value of cash flows representing the interest at the existing rate charged on
the advance before restructuring and the principal, discounted at a rate
equal to the bank's base prime lending rate, as on the date of restructuring
plus the appropriate term premium and credit risk premium for the borrower
category on the date of restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: present value of cash flows representing the interest at the existing rate charged on the advance before restructuring and the prin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Fair value of the loan after restructuring shall be computed as the present
value of cash flows representing the interest at the rate charged on the
advance on restructuring and the principal, discounted at a rate equal to the
bank's base prime lending rate as on the date of restructuring plus the
Explanation: The above formula moderates the swing in the diminution of
present value of loans with the interest rate cycle and will have to be
followed consistently in future.
enriched_requirements.object: present value of cash flows representing the interest at the rate charged on the advance on restructuring and the principal, discou

(4) In the case of working capital facilities, the diminution in the fair value of the
cash credit / overdraft component shall be computed as indicated in sub-
paragraphs (1) to (3) above, reckoning the higher of the outstanding amount
or the limit sanctioned as the principal amount and taking the tenor of the
advance as one year, with the term premium in the discount factor as that
would be as applicable for one year.
enriched_requirements.object: in sub- paragraphs (1) to (3) above, reckoning the higher of the outstanding amount or the limit sanctioned as the principal

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In the case of working capital facilities, the fair value of the term loan
components (Working Capital Term Loan and Funded Interest Term Loan)
shall be computed as per actual cash flows and taking the term premium in
the discount factor as applicable for the maturity of the respective term loan
components.
enriched_requirements.object: actual cash flows and taking the term premium in the discount factor as applicable for the maturity of the respective term loan com

conditions:
If any security is taken in lieu of the diminution in the fair value of the
advance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) If any security is taken in lieu of the diminution in the fair value of the
advance, it shall be valued at ₹1/- till maturity of the security.
enriched_requirements.object: till maturity of the security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The diminution in the fair value shall be re-computed on each balance sheet
date till satisfactory completion of all repayment obligations and full
repayment of the outstanding in the account, to capture the changes in the
fair value on account of changes in the base prime lending rate, term
premium and credit category of the borrower, and consequently, the
shortfall in provision shall be provided for or amount of excess provision
held in the distinct account may be reversed, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: balance sheet date till satisfactory completion of all repayment obligations and full repayment of the outstanding in the accou

conditions: If due to lack of expertise/appropriate infrastructure
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(8) If due to lack of expertise/appropriate infrastructure, a bank finds it difficult
to ensure computation of diminution in the fair value of advances extended
by small branches, the bank shall have the alternative option of notionally
computing the amount of diminution in the fair value and providing therefor,
enriched_requirements.object: of notionally computing the amount of diminution in the fair value and providing therefor,

conditions: If the account is not eligible for upgradation after the specified period
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank availing special regulatory treatment for asset classification in terms of
paragraphs 34 to 38 shall make the following provisions in respect of unsecured
portion of the working capital term loans created by conversion of the irregular
portion of principal dues over the drawing power
(1) Standard Assets: 20 per cent
(2) Substandard Assets: 20 per cent during the first year and to be increased
by 20 per cent every year thereafter until the specified period
(3) If the account is not eligible for upgradation after the specified period, the
unsecured portion shall attract provision of 100 per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of unsecured portion of the working capital term loans created by conversion of the irregular portion of prin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest income in respect of restructured accounts classified as 'standard assets'
may be recognized on accrual basis and that in respect of the restructured accounts
classified as 'non-performing assets' shall be recognised on cash basis.
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall recognize interest income on the additional finance only on cash basis
in the case of accounts where the pre-restructuring facilities were classified as 'sub-
standard' and 'doubtful'.
enriched_requirements.object: the additional finance only on cash basis in the case of accounts where the pre-restructuring facilities were classified

conditions: if any, generated may be recognised on accrual basis

if FITL
is classified as 'standard'
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall recognise interest income on 'Funded Interest Term Loan' (FITL)
created by conversion of unpaid interest as follows:
(1) The income, if any, generated may be recognised on accrual basis, if FITL
is classified as 'standard', and on cash basis in the cases where the same
has been classified as a non-performing asset.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Funded Interest Term Loan' (FITL) created by conversion of unpaid interest as follows: (1) The income

(2) The unrealised income represented by FITL should have a corresponding
credit in an account styled as 'Sundry Liabilities Account (Interest
Capitalization)'.
enriched_requirements.object: in an account styled as 'Sundry Liabilities Account (Interest Capitalization)'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Borrowers who have committed frauds/ malfeasance/ wilful default as well as any
entity with which a wilful defaulter is associated shall remain ineligible for
restructuring.

A wilful defaulter or any entity with which a wilful defaulter is associated shall be
eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from
the List of Wilful Defaulters, subject to penal measures applicable to borrowers
classified as wilful defaulter in terms of the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-
operative Banks - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions,
2025.
enriched_requirements.object: subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from the List of Wilful Defaulters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The objective of compromise settlements shall be to maximise the possible recovery
from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: possible recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The compromise settlements and technical write-offs shall be without prejudice to
any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a bank and a borrower relating
to future contingent realizations or recovery by the bank, subject to such claims not
being recognised in any manner on the balance sheet of the bank at the time of the
settlement or subsequently till actual realization of such receivables.
enriched_requirements.object: any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a bank and a borrower relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that any such claims recognised on the balance sheet of the bank shall
render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring.
enriched_requirements.object: be treated as restructuring

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding paragraph 53, compromise settlements where the time for payment
of the agreed settlement amount exceeds three months shall be treated as
restructuring.

Any arrangement involving part settlement with the borrower shall also fall under the
definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto.
enriched_requirements.object: definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However,
such technical write-offs do not entail any waiver of claims against the borrower and
thus the bank's right to recovery shall not be undermined in any manner.
enriched_requirements.object: manner

conditions: In case of partial technical write-offs
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of partial technical write-offs, the prudential requirements in respect of
residual exposure, including provisioning and asset classification, shall be with
reference to the original exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: the original exposure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the amount of provision including the amount representing partial
technical write-off shall meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on
the gross value of the asset.
enriched_requirements.object: requirements, as computed on the gross value of the asset

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a
quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs
approved by a particular authority.
enriched_requirements.object: to the next higher authority, at least on a quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that compromise settlements and technical write-offs approved by the MD
& CEO / Board Level Committee shall be reported to the Board.
enriched_requirements.object: Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate
coverage of the following aspects at the minimum:
(1) trend in number of accounts and amounts subjected to compromise
settlement and/or technical write-off (q-o-q and y-o-y);
enriched_requirements.object: format so as to ensure adequate coverage of the following aspects at the minimum: (1) trend in number of accounts and amo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of borrowers subject to compromise settlements, there shall be a cooling
period as determined by the respective Board approved policies before the bank
can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: as determined by the respective Board approved policies before the bank can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the cooling period in respect of exposures other than farm credit
exposures shall be subject to a floor of 12 months with a bank being free to stipulate
higher cooling periods in terms of their Board approved policies.
enriched_requirements.object: floor of 12 months with a bank being free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms of their Board approved policies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that the cooling period for farm credit exposures shall be
determined by a bank as per their respective Board approved policies.
enriched_requirements.object: bank as per their respective Board approved policies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Farm credit for the above purpose shall refer to credit extended to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of the Model Operating Procedure (MOP), Debt Relief Schemes (DRS)
refer to Schemes notified by the State Governments that entail funding by the fiscal
authorities to cover debt obligations of a targeted segment of borrowers that the regulated
entities are required to sacrifice / waive.

Announcement / notification of any such DRS should include the specific stress or distress
situation necessitating announcement of such support.
enriched_requirements.object: or distress situation necessitating announcement of such support

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Given the broader implications of
such DRS for the credit culture, while broad based relief measures can be addressed through
pure fiscal support in the form of Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT), DRS should be considered
only as a measure of last resort when other measures to alleviate financial stress have failed.
enriched_requirements.object: a measure of last resort when other measures to alleviate financial stress have failed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

Committee (SLBC)/ District level Consultative Committee (DCC) to evolve a coordinated

assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues concerning settlement of dues by
Government to the lending institutions, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: of the scheme like identification of borrowers, impact assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues concerning

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: should also be taken into account.

conditions:

enriched_requirements.object: a fully pre-funded basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

enriched_requirements.object: the impacted borrowers and should not contain any restrictive covenant against timely repayments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

settlement of claims along with compensation clauses for delays in settling the funds, on part

enriched_requirements.object: determining eligible borrowers on an objective basis, detailed timeline of critical / material events, including cut-off date

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

including principal and accumulated interest till the date of receipt of funds by the regulated
entities from the Government.

enriched_requirements.object: a receivable in the books of the regulated entity against the Government

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

enriched_requirements.object: reduced to the extent of funds received from the Government

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The entire implementation of the Scheme and settlement of claims by the Governments to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

enriched_requirements.object: to any regulatory instruction issued by the Reserve Bank / NABARD

a.
